stemHtml: A NO ENTRY sign shall be located…

options.a: at the beginning of the area to which entrance is prohibited on each side of the taxiway.
options.b: 50 m prior to the area to which entrance is prohibited on the left side of the taxiway.
options.c: 50 m prior to the area to which entrance is prohibited, on each side of the taxiway.
options.d: at the beginning of the area to which entrance is prohibited on the left side of the taxiway.
